topic.title: Action Required: Submit Your Final Presentation by Friday
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

If you have your final presentation scheduled for next week, please submit your slides by Friday 17th April, 2026 11:59PM EST at the latest. Professor will review them beforehand to ensure everything is in order. This gives you a chance to address any major missing items before you present and avoid unnecessary deductions.

Please don't wait until the last minute!

 

Best,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
